defaults.pr: Review and work on PR #{number} in {repo}. Title: {title}. Summary: {body_summary}
defaults.issue:
Investigate issue #{number} in {repo}: {title}. {body_summary}

Investigate, then make a plan.
defaults.issue_followup: Do the work in a new branch. Then commit and push, create a PR, and do a code review.
defaults.issue_full:
Investigate issue #{number} in {repo}: {title}. {body_summary}

Investigate and make a plan. Then work in a new branch, commit and push, create a PR, and do a code review.
